scripts.generate: npm run generate:pakistan && npm run generate:dubai
scripts.generate:pakistan: cd packages/database-prisma && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/pakistan/schema.prisma --binary-targets=debian-openssl-3.0.x,rhel-openssl-3.0.x,linux-musl
scripts.generate:dubai: cd packages/database-prisma && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/dubai/schema.prisma --binary-targets=debian-openssl-3.0.x,rhel-openssl-3.0.x,linux-musl
scripts.build: npm run generate && turbo run build
